rationale.R1.1: The agent failed to identify the conceptual issue with the contributions list and methods paragraph contradicting each other.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged uncertainty for some clearly out-of-reach claims, but did not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly covered the agreed scope, but had one drift in the evaluation section.
rationale.RX.4: The output introduced new errors (e.g., 'substantial improvements over direct execution' is an overclaim) and fabrications (e.g., the vague forward-looking claim).
rationale.RX.5: The output did not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason.
